seoTitle: How to Set Up URL Redirects in GoHighLevel Easily
metaDescription: Learn how to create URL redirects in GoHighLevel to send traffic from old links to new pages and keep your website performing well.
intro: URL redirects make sure visitors land on the right page even when old links or outdated content are still floating around, which matters for both user experience and website performance. This guide walks through understanding what redirects do, setting them up in GoHighLevel, and applying them to common business scenarios. It's aimed at marketers, business owners, and beginners who want to keep their online presence accurate as their site evolves.

steps.heading: Understand what URL redirects do
steps.body: A redirect automatically sends visitors from an old or outdated URL to a new, relevant page instead of leaving them at a dead end.

steps.heading: Recognize the benefits for website traffic
steps.body: Redirecting traffic from outdated pages to current content helps maintain your site's performance and can improve conversion rates.

steps.heading: Set up the redirect step by step
steps.body: Within GoHighLevel, navigate to the redirect settings and configure the old URL to point to the new destination page.

steps.heading: Apply redirects to common business scenarios
steps.body: Use redirects when retiring old campaign pages, updating your site structure, or consolidating content into a single updated page.

steps.heading: Leverage automation for URL management
steps.body: GoHighLevel's integrations can help automate parts of URL management, making it easier to maintain redirects as your site grows.

faq.question: Why would I need a URL redirect on my GoHighLevel site?
faq.answer: Redirects are useful when a page has moved, been renamed, or retired, ensuring visitors still land somewhere relevant instead of a broken link.

faq.question: Do redirects affect my website's search ranking?
faq.answer: Properly set redirects generally help preserve traffic and user experience when URLs change, rather than leaving visitors at dead links.

faq.question: Can I set up multiple redirects at once in GoHighLevel?
faq.answer: You can configure multiple redirects as needed, setting each one to its own destination page individually.

faq.question: Is this feature suitable for beginners?
faq.answer: Yes, the redirect setup is designed to be straightforward, making it accessible even for those new to GoHighLevel.

faq.question: How do redirects help with marketing campaigns?
faq.answer: Redirects let you retire old campaign-specific pages while still guiding visitors to current, relevant content instead of a dead page.
